from __future__ import annotations


class Counter:
    def __init__(self) -> None:
        self.value = 0

    def increment(self) -> None:
        self.value += 1

    def render(self) -> str:
        return f"Count is now {self.value}"


def method_mutates_state_and_emits_user_facing_representation_negative() -> str:
    counter = Counter()
    counter.increment()
    return counter.render()
